behavior_summary: U8P_BUBLAST::anim is a persistent item process that animates a bubble-blast item and runs a periodic tick loop (suspend/resume).
Each tick it sets the item's animation frame and samples the item's world coordinates (X, Y, Z).
On some ticks it uses randomized checks to optionally spawn or trigger a visual/effect helper (inferred from FREE::randomInRange, FREE::func1C19 and FIRESPEL::func1F65).

It tests for overlapping entities via Item::overlaps; if an overlap is found a local target variable is populated and a small local 'menu/target' flag/list (local3) is used to remember the candidate target.

Overlapped entities are filtered by type (Item::getType == 0x60 clears the candidate), and when a valid target is present the process computes direction (Item::getDirFromCoords) and calls METHOD::receiveHitWrapper with a random damage roll to apply a hit.
notable_control_flow: Initialization: Item::setFrame is called early to set the item's visual frame.
Main loop: sample coordinates (Item::getX/getY/getZ) -> suspend (periodic tick) -> on resume continue logic.
Randomized spawn/effect branch: FREE::randomInRange and FREE::func1C19 are compared to decide whether to invoke FIRESPEL::func1F65 (spawn/effect).
Target acquisition: Item::overlaps populates local1; successful overlap leads to adding the target to local3 (menu/target list).
Target filtering: Item::getType is checked and a specific type value (0x60) clears the candidate target.
Damage application: when local3 indicates a target, compute direction via Item::getDirFromCoords and call METHOD::receiveHitWrapper with a random damage value.
open_questions: Exact semantics and effects of FREE::func1C19 and FIRESPEL::func1F65 (appear spawn/effect related but exact game effect is inferred).
Precise numeric thresholds, ranges, and timing used by FREE::randomInRange for spawn frequency and damage rolls.
Whether type 0x60 represents a specific entity class (friend, projectile, or environment) and the gameplay reason for clearing targets of that type.
Whether the sampled Z (local4) is used for vertical targeting or only recorded without further effect in the visible nodes.

main_function.name: U8P_BUBLAST::anim
main_function.purpose: Animate a bubble-blast item and periodically attempt to produce effects and damage nearby overlapped entities by selecting targets, filtering by type, computing hit direction, and invoking a hit wrapper with a randomized damage roll.
entry_conditions: Runs as a persistent process (processType 0x020A) that suspends and resumes repeatedly (periodic tick behavior).
Implicit entry on process start or item creation; resumes each tick after suspend.

function_map.name: U8P_BUBLAST::anim
function_map.role: periodic item process that handles animation, spawn/effect decisions, overlap checks, target management, and applying hits

function_map.name: Item::setFrame
function_map.role: set visual animation frame for the item

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: read item's X coordinate each tick

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: read item's Y coordinate each tick

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: read item's Z coordinate each tick

function_map.name: FREE::randomInRange
function_map.role: generate randomized values for spawn decisions and damage rolls (inferred)

function_map.name: FREE::func1C19
function_map.role: spawn/decision helper compared to random output (inferred)

function_map.name: Item::overlaps
function_map.role: check for overlap and populate a local target reference

function_map.name: Item::getType
function_map.role: return the type code of an overlapped object used for filtering (e.g., type 0x60)

function_map.name: Item::getDirFromCoords
function_map.role: compute direction from blast to target for hit application

function_map.name: METHOD::receiveHitWrapper
function_map.role: apply damage/hit to the target using computed direction and randomized damage

external_calls.purpose: Initialize or update the item's animation frame each process cycle or at start
Read item X coordinate for spawn/effect placement and direction calculation
Read item Y coordinate for direction calculation
Read item Z coordinate (sampled each tick; exact use is unclear)
Generate random values for deciding spawn/effects and for damage rolls passed to receiveHitWrapper
Compare against random output to gate spawn/effect calls (inferred)
Invoke a spawn/effect at the item's X coordinate (inferred visual/projectile effect)
Detect overlapping entities and populate local1 as a candidate target
Query overlapped entity type to filter or clear the candidate target (type 0x60 clears local3)
Compute attack direction from blast coordinates toward the target for receiveHitWrapper
Apply a hit/damage to the found target using a random damage roll and computed direction

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_BUBLAST::anim is a persistent item process that animates a bubble-blast item and runs a periodic tick loop (suspend/resume).
